title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese presents six core skills for maximizing Claude AI projects: web scraping for data discovery, ingest-source for knowledge base capture, improve-system for iterative refinement, ask-the-board for multi-perspective advice, internal-focus-group for testing, and compound engineering for shipping. The methodology is demonstrated through building a personal fitness trainer project.
